message:
fix(types): migrate to @types/bun and tighten type safety across tests and libs

Replace bare bun-types with @types/bun (the officially published
declaration package) so tsconfig types resolution works without custom
path hacks. Adds @ts-ignore annotations to globalThis.fetch mock
assignments in tests — these are intentionally loose stubs that don't
satisfy the full fetch signature, and the ignore makes that explicit
rather than relying on implicit any. Also: import SupportStatus type
instead of casting to any, add explicit return type to runAxeAudit and
PlaywrightLogger.getEntries, import missing vi in dmca route test, use
proper two-step cast (as unknown as ...) in ReviewCard test, and remove
redundant Math.abs on an already-unsigned hash modulo in semantic search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
